subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Mount the steed of ardor in the service of thy Lord's Cause, the All-Encompassing, the Self-Subsisting. The verses have been sent down and are made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد اسرج جواد الهمه فی خدمه امر ربک المهیمن القیوم قد نزلت الایات و ظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @call to action
